content: Contentlayer is abandoned (last npm publish June 2023, no funding). Velite and content-collections are the two actively maintained type-safe content-layer alternatives; both use Zod schemas. content-collections is Contentlayer-inspired, has first-class Next.js App Router/RSC adapters and is used by Fumadocs. Velite is framework-agnostic, lighter, outputs JSON+typed DTS. next-mdx-remote is a lighter-weight alternative that only handles MDX compilation, not content sourcing/validation/typing.
